title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Device disconnected
scenario: "Device has been disconnected" notification appears despite Notifications master toggle being OFF in Poly Lens Menu > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: Go to Poly Lens Menu → General → Notifications & Device Alerts
Set the Notifications master toggle to OFF
Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device
Press the Power button on the connected headset to turn it off
Observe whether a 'Device has been disconnected' notification appears
expected: No "Device has been disconnected" notification should appear when the Notifications master toggle is OFF.
